title: Update non-module dependencies
body:
Dependabot was apparently not picking these up (and several haven't had a release for a long time anyway).

Also move from `github.com/go-check/check` to its newly declared (and `go.mod`-enforced) name `gopkg.in/check.v1`.

Signed-off-by: Miloslav Trmač <mitr@redhat.com>
